messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

source:
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { supabase } from '@/shared/lib/supabase' import { Trash2, Eye, Calendar, User } from 'lucide-react' import type { ComparisonResult } from '@/shared/types' import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast' import { ConfirmDialog } from '@/shared/components/ConfirmDialog' interface SavedComparison { id: string name: string notes: string | null created_at: string customer_id: string | null results: ComparisonResult[] consumption_p1: number consumption_p2: number consumption_p3: number contracted_power_p1: number | null contracted_power_p2: number | null customers?: { name: string } } export function ComparisonHistory() { const [comparisons, setComparisons] = useState([]) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [selectedComparison, setSelectedComparison] = useState(null) const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState(null) const { toast } = useToast() useEffect(() => { fetchComparisons() }, []) const fetchComparisons = async () => { setLoading(true) const { data } = await supabase .from('saved_comparisons') .select(` *, customers(name) `) .order('created_at', { ascending: false }) if (data) { setComparisons(data as any) } setLoading(false) } const deleteComparison = async () => { if (!deleteTarget) return const { error } = await supabase .from('saved_comparisons') .delete() .eq('id', deleteTarget) if (!error) { toast({ title: 'Comparativa eliminada', description: 'La comparativa se ha eliminado correctamente.' }) fetchComparisons() if (selectedComparison?.id === deleteTarget) { setSelectedComparison(null) } } else { toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'No se pudo eliminar la comparativa.', variant: 'destructive' }) } setDeleteTarget(null) } if (loading) { return
Cargando...
} return ( <>
{/* Lista de comparativas */}
{comparisons.length === 0 ? (

No hay comparativas guardadas

Las comparativas guardadas desde el Comparador aparecer├ín aqu├¡

) : (
{comparisons.map((comp) => (
setSelectedComparison(comp)} >
{comp.name}
{comp.customers && (
{comp.customers.name}
)}
{new Date(comp.created_at).toLocaleDateString('es-ES', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })}
{comp.results.length} tarifas comparadas
))}
)}
{/* Detalles de la comparativa seleccionada */}
{selectedComparison ? (
{selectedComparison.notes && (
Notas

{selectedComparison.notes}

)}
Consumo P1
{selectedComparison.consumption_p1} kWh
Consumo P2
{selectedComparison.consumption_p2} kWh
Consumo P3
{selectedComparison.consumption_p3} kWh
{selectedComparison.contracted_power_p1 && (
Potencia P1
{selectedComparison.contracted_power_p1} kW
)} {selectedComparison.contracted_power_p2 && (
Potencia P2
{selectedComparison.contracted_power_p2} kW
)}
{selectedComparison.results.map((result, index) => (
{result.tariff_version?.supplier_name || 'Sin Comercializadora'}
{result.tariff_version?.tariff_name}
Coste Anual
{Math.round(result.annual_cost_eur)}Ôé¼
Mensual {result.monthly_cost_eur}Ôé¼
{result.annual_savings_eur && result.annual_savings_eur > 0 && (
Ahorro {Math.round(result.annual_savings_eur)}Ôé¼/a├▒o
)}
))}
) : (

Selecciona una comparativa para ver los detalles

)}
setDeleteTarget(null)} /> ) }
